faqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.q1: How do I upload a document?
faqPage.a1: Go to Upload from the side menu. Drag a file into the upload area or click it to select a file. Fill in the title, folder, and tags if needed. Click Upload all; the file will be processed and indexed automatically.
faqPage.a2: The system supports PDF (.pdf), Microsoft Word (.docx), Microsoft Excel (.xlsx), and text files (.txt). Maximum file size is 50 MB.
faqPage.a3: Go to the main search page. Enter text, a document excerpt, or keywords. Use filters for file type and upload date. The system performs semantic search, so it understands meaning rather than exact word matches only.
faqPage.a4: After upload, the document is processed automatically: text extraction, chunking, and vector index creation for search. This usually takes from a few seconds to 1-2 minutes depending on file size. When complete, the status changes to Indexed.
faqPage.q5: How do I share access to a document?
faqPage.a5: On the Documents page, find the document and click Share. In the dialog, add a user by ID or an organization. Choose an access level: Viewer, Editor, or Owner.
faqPage.q6: What is the difference between access levels?
faqPage.a6: Viewer can search, preview, and download the document. Editor can also change metadata. Owner has full access, including deletion and permission management. The uploader automatically receives owner rights.
faqPage.q7: How do I use AI Assistant?
faqPage.a7: Go to AI Assistant from the side menu. Ask a question about documents, request help finding information, or ask about system usage. The assistant answers in Russian by default and understands conversation context.
faqPage.a8: Organizations group users and manage document access for the whole group. You can create an organization, add colleagues, and attach a document to it on upload so all members receive access.
faqPage.q9: How do I change my profile or password?
faqPage.a9: Open Profile from the side menu. Click Edit to change username or email. Use Change password on the same page to enter the current and new password.
faqPage.q10: What should I do if document processing fails?
faqPage.a10: If a document shows Error, check that the file is not corrupted or password-protected, verify that it is under 50 MB, or ask an administrator to reindex it from Administration.
faqPage.a11: Unlike keyword search, semantic search understands meaning. For example, an office lease query can find a document about commercial premises even without exact matching words.
faqPage.q12: Can I download the original file?
faqPage.a12: Yes. On Search, click Download under a document card. On Documents, use the Download row action. You need at least Viewer access.
faqPage.a13: Go to Settings from the bottom menu. In Notifications you can enable or disable categories such as uploads, deletion, permission changes, and system messages.
faqPage.q14: How do I find documents in a specific folder?
faqPage.a14: Specify a folder path during upload, for example /legal/contracts/. During search, use the folder filter to limit results. Folder filtering is also available on Documents.
